$comment: Declares which settings are user-adjustable, operator-only, or immutable. Instance values for grace-mar.

user_adjustable.description: Token budget allocations for prepared context

operator_only.description: Surface authority classes (human_only, review_required, draftable, ephemeral_only)

immutable.description: JSON schemas — versioned, never silently modified
Core doctrine (Layer 1) — knowledge boundary, gated pipeline, authority classes
